notes: Strict comparison covers the first local customerSet create branch. Companion customerSet parity specs promote the same fixture's id update, email/phone upsert, address replacement, and validation branches into executable runner coverage. Positive identifier.customId remains unsupported until customer unique-metafield definitions and values are modeled locally; the unsupported custom-id branch returns the captured top-level NOT_FOUND error without runtime passthrough.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy stages customerSet locally and returns a stable synthetic Customer GID instead of Shopify's live Customer GID.
The proxy stages customerSet with a deterministic local timestamp while Shopify returns the live write timestamp.
The proxy stages customerSet with a deterministic local timestamp while Shopify returns the live write timestamp.
